description: Mercantile letter in Judaeo-Arabic. The sender and addressee are unknown. Dating: Probably 11th century. Mentions people such as Abū Yaʿaqov the brother of Tamra(?); a poor old man (shaykh suʿlūk); Ibn al-Fakkāh. Mentions goods such as: pepper, cinnamon, brazilwood, wheat, oil, and Kirmānī indigo. (Information from Gil, Kingdom, Vol. 4, #835.) VMR
tags: brazilwood, pepper, oil, wheat, cinnamon, indigo
description_he: מכתב מסחרי ביהודית-ערבית, כנראה המאה ה-11, שולח ונמען לא ידועים, על פלפל, קינמון, חיטה, שמן ואינדיגו קירמאני
